title: Scaffold Supabase project with initial schema and RLS
description: supabase init, migration 0001_init.sql defining feeds/items/subscriptions/item_state per ADR-0003. RLS policies. Storage bucket for article bodies.

title: Add GH Actions refresh cron workflow
description: Cron schedule 0 */2 * * *. POSTs to the Supabase refresh-feeds Edge Function with FUNCTION_SECRET. Doubles as Supabase keepalive.

title: Add GH Actions deploy to gh-pages workflow
description: On push to main, build and publish dist to gh-pages branch. Configure Pages source on the repo.

title: Add GH Actions CI workflow
description: Lint, typecheck, vitest, playwright, build on PRs and main.

title: Write initial ADRs (0001-0006)
description: Land six MADR-formatted ADRs before MVP code: Vite SPA over Next.js; GH Pages + GH Actions cron over Vercel; Supabase + RLS as guardrail; bodies in Storage; client-side DOMPurify; beads for tracking.

title: Deploy MVP and verify cross-device sync
description: Push to main, GH Pages serves SPA. Sign in on Mac + Android, mark read on one device, confirm sync on the other within seconds. Wait 2h, confirm cron-fetched items arrive.

title: UI: Reader view
description: DOMPurify-sanitised HTML for articles. Native <audio> with playback rate + saved position for podcasts. Link-out card with thumbnail for YouTube items.

title: Read / saved / archived state mutations
description: Optimistic toggles via TanStack Query mutations. Sync via Supabase. Manual mark-read, star/save, archive.

title: UI: Item list (virtualised)
description: Per-feed, per-folder, All unread, Saved views. Virtualisation for long lists. Mark read on scroll-past.

title: UI: Add feed flow
description: Paste URL, call discover-feed, confirm metadata, create subscription. Optimistic add.

title: UI: Feed list sidebar with unread counts
description: Folders, drag to reorder, unread badges. Mobile-first responsive collapse.

title: Edge Function: refresh-feeds
description: Deno function: iterate feeds, conditional GET with etag/last-modified, parse with fast-xml-parser, idempotent upsert items by (feed_id, guid), write bodies to Storage, update last_fetched_at.

title: Edge Function: discover-feed
description: Deno function: given a URL, fetch and parse, return canonical feed URL + kind. Calls the discovery utility on the server to avoid CORS.

title: Supabase Auth (magic link) sign-in screen
description: Email magic link via Supabase Auth. Sign-in screen, sign-out button, auth-gated routes.

title: Feed URL discovery utility (TDD)
description: Pure function: given a URL, return { feed_url, kind }. Cases: bare RSS/Atom URL, Substack /feed/, Substack root, YouTube channel/handle URL, generic homepage with <link rel="alternate">. Red Vitest first, then green.

title: PWA install polish (icons, manifest, offline shell)
description: 192/512/maskable icons. Theme colours. Service worker caching the app shell + last-seen items. Verify install prompt on Mac Chrome and Android Chrome.

title: OPML import and export
description: Standard OPML 2.0. Import: drag-drop or paste, dedupe by feed URL. Export: download .opml of current subscriptions.
